Introducing Plug That Shop 🔌

So @Shopify launched their UCP CLI that allows all the products on their stores available via the command line.

I was thinking of interesting use cases for the CLI over the weekend and realized that I can use this to create contextual embedded shops for websites.

So now, you can enter your website and get four HIGHLY relevant shops that you can embed in just one click.

For the buyer using this shop, it's an insanely simple experience since they can click buy and checkout with Shop in literally one click.

Available, free to use, NO affiliate revenue at plugthatshop dot com

Feedback welcome!

Ok I've fallen for the ragebaiting and have been triggered by this so I'm going to say this: 

Whether intentional or not, there's a lot of virality that comes from:

1. Pick the most ragebait moment of the conversation
2. Make a clip of that exact moment
3. Get tons of retweets and views

I can tell it's rage baiting (just like the Corgi founder clip) but here's the thing - if even one parent watches this clip and decides to neglect their kids more then the damage is done.

And yes it's hard to work at home when your kid comes back at 3 pm (or 1 pm with summer camp!) but we all make our choices.

The California asset seizure tax is only going to impoverish the state and reduce funding for health care

The SEIU UHW union doesn’t care if quality of care or even the state’s ability to care for its people goes away

There is only pure self interest there https://t.co/KI3PnPkvV3

Happens every week 🙈

> see an interesting project on X
> play with it, fork it, try it, have some ideas
> go to founder profile
> press the message button 

…

> pray to God that I haven’t missed a DM from them before 😢

I try to respond to all the DMs but miss sometimes!!

AP reports on the $200M sales level

Asset seizure is evil. My grandparents and parents generations came to America to flee asset seizure and this ideology. We came here to build prosperity. 

An America that still builds is worth defending. 

https://t.co/L8j4FFUkOW
